zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis於1025年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特時，她的父親Renaud de Clermont de Creil I15歲，母親Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais16歲。她與Wallerand de Saint-Just結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1067年在法國皮卡迪奧易沙吉斯吉-豪瑟享年42歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis was born in 1025, in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, was 15 and her mother, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, was 16. She married Wallerand de Saint-Just. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1067, in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis est née en 1025, à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Wallerand de Saint-Just. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1067, à Saint-Just-en-Chaussée, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis 1025 in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud de Clermont de Creil I 15 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais 16. Sie hat Wallerand de Saint-Just geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1067 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis è nata il nel 1025 nel Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Wallerand de Saint-Just. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1067, nel Saint-Just-en-Chaussée, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisisが1025年にフランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Renaud de Clermont de Creil Iは15歳，母Ermengarde de clermont en beauvaisは16歳であった。Wallerand de Saint-Justと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1067年にフランスピカーディオイゼサイント-ジャスト-エン-チャウスeで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis(이)가 1025년 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud de Clermont de Creil I(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Wallerand de Saint-Just(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1067년 프랑스 피카디 이스 세인트-j스트--차우스e에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis nasceu em 1025, em Clermont, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Wallerand de Saint-Just. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1067, em Saint-Just-en-Chaussée, Oise, Picardie, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis родилась в 1025 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud de Clermont de Creil I было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wallerand de Saint-Just. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1067 г. в местности сеинт-джюст-ен-чауссe, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis nació en 1025, en Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Wallerand de Saint-Just. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1067, en Saint-Just-en-Chaussée, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
